titleStmt.title: SII 27.425: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 425. (A.R. No. 559 of 1929-30.) HATTIYAṄGAḌI, COONDAPOOR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in prākāra of the Lokanāthēśvara temple.

This record is dated Śaka 1499, Īśvara, bēsage (summer season) 27, Friday. The actual month is not given. The months Jyēshṭha-Āshāḍha being the summer months, when the given details prabably correspond to 1577 A.D., May 24 which seems to be the intended date.
The record ratifies the gift of income from taxes made to god Lōkanātha of Haṭṭiyaṅgaḍi by Baṁkiyarasa alias Honne Kaṁbaḷivoḍeya, by the nāḍu, dēśa and all other residents of Hārū-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī vijayodbudeya śālivāhana śakavaruśa 1499 saṁdu saluva vartamāna�yośvara saṁcyarada bē
sageya tiṁgaḷu 27 hōha śukravāradalu śrīmattu haṭṭiyaṁgaḍiya lōkanāthadēvara divyaśrīpādapa
dmaṁgaḷige dēvarabhaṁḍārake hārunāḍa nāḍudēśa samastaru saduvineya bhayabhaṁktiyiṁ śāṣṭāṁga veragi
poḍavaṁṭṭu barasikoṭa darṁmasādanada vakhaṇeya kramaveṁteṁdare naṁma hārunāḍa guḷapāḍiya
maṁḍinavoḷage haṭṭiyaṁgaḍiya lōkanāthadēvara dēvasvada bāḷa mē lu kuḍukūra koṭīśvaradēvaradē
vasvadamēlu nānānāḍu birāḍa yēnuṁṭādadanu nāu nāḍu
dēśa samastaru ta Urnayiya Ayana Uścahakke dēvasvada mēlebaṁda honu ha
ṇa yēnuṁṭādudanu Ācaṁdrārkkavāgi naḍadu bahaṁtāgi baṁkka Arasaru hone kaṁbaḷi voḍeyaru
biṭṭa dharmasādanakke nāu nāḍudēśa samastaru voppi barasi koṭṭeU yiṁ sākṣigaḷu Ādityacaṁdraru
nāḍudēśa samastara voppage koṁḍada Ūravaru nāga sēnabō vana seṭṭiya baraha .
Digital edition of SII 27.425 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
